% Hermetic macro source for build tests. Mirrors the real ~/.pandoc tier files
% in shape (\newcommand, \DeclareMathOperator, an arg-macro) without depending on
% the live macro set, which changes frequently.
\newcommand{\AA}{\mathbb{A}}
\newcommand{\Ztest}{\mathbb{Z}_{\mathrm{test}}}
\DeclareMathOperator{\Spectest}{Spec}
\newcommand{\pair}[2]{\langle #1, #2 \rangle}
